svg.title: Phred score encoding
svg.desc: Two-panel figure. Top: a conversion table mapping Phred Q-score to error probability, ASCII value, and character with cells coloured red to green. Bottom: a 25-base example read with each base in a colour-coded box, its ASCII quality character underneath, and a per-position Q-score bar chart.

g.text: QUALITY BINS USED IN PANEL B
25 bp Illumina-style read; quality declines toward the 3′ end
